top_signals.title: Meet the woman who won $500,000 playing Candy Crush

top_signals.title: Cool Japan Fund may be scrapped by industry ministry after posting high losses
top_signals.summary: The plan to end the Cool Japan Fund is being considered after its cumulative losses reached ¥54 billion in fiscal 2025.

top_signals.title: Global Battery Storage Boom Is A Boon for Tesla
top_signals.summary: Global battery storage installations are booming, and so is Tesla’s utility-scale battery business. Tesla has just signed a multi-year supply and execution agreement with clean energy infrastructure provider NatPower for more than 25 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of battery energy storage systems (BESS) in Europe, as the continent is accelerating battery deployment to make the most of its domestic renewable energy resources. Europe’s battery storage and renewables-plus-storage installations are booming and set to further accelerate in the coming…

top_signals.title: DraftKings hacker 'Snoopy' sentenced to 18 months in prison
top_signals.summary: A 21-year-old using the alias "Snoopy" was sentenced to 18 months in prison for his role in hacking DraftKings accounts in the November 2022 cyberattack. [...]
